questions.question: What TV show with the character Paladin was a gun-for-hire in the Old West?
In the 50s and 60s, if a person needed to communicate quickly without phoning long-distance, what was the only other option?
This artist began his chart-topping ways in the 60s with 'Fingertips,' 'For Once in My Life,' and 'Signed, Sealed, Delivered I'm Yours.'
What basketball legend was the first selected to the Basketball Hall of Fame as a player (1960) and a coach (1973), but also was famous for his Pyramid of Success life philosophy?
What was the famous phrase in ABC's Wide World of Sports intro?
questions.answer: 'The thrill of victory and the agony of defeat'
